# Norr Studio

> Web design and development for Finnish SMEs.
> We build conversion-focused websites for trades: barbers, LVI, restaurants, and more.
> Based in Helsinki, Finland. Serving all of Finland.

## About

Norr Studio is a Helsinki-based web design and development agency specializing in
creating high-converting websites for small and medium enterprises (SMEs) in Finland.

We focus on trades and service businesses: barbershops, LVI (heating/ventilation)
companies, restaurants, cafes, and other local businesses that need a professional
online presence.

Our approach combines AI-powered design tools with human expertise to deliver
websites faster and more affordably than traditional agencies.

## Services

- **Web Design** - Custom, conversion-focused website design
- **Web Development** - Full-stack development with modern technologies
- **SEO** - Search engine optimization for Finnish markets
- **Branding** - Visual identity and brand strategy
- **Maintenance** - Ongoing support and updates

## Target Audience

Finnish SMEs, particularly in:
- Beauty & wellness (barbers, hair salons, spas)
- Construction & trades (LVI, electricians, plumbers)
- Food & beverage (restaurants, cafes, bakeries)
- Professional services
